title: Healer's Sweet Potato Fries
description: A crispy twist on a classic side dish, perfect for a comforting meal. Sweet potato fries are a delicious and easy-to-make treat.
instructions: Cut the sweet potatoes into long, thin strips.
Place the sweet potato strips on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
Drizzle with olive oil and sprinkle with healer's herb.
Bake for 20-25 minutes, or until crispy.
Remove from the oven and sprinkle with crispy topping.
